phrase_1: He never left… you just stopped looking.
phrase_3: You let your guard down… and now we’re here.
phrase_4: You were warned. You just didn’t listen.
phrase_5: We see you. Even when you forget us.
phrase_7: We watch you. Even when you close your eyes.
phrase_8: It was always us pulling the strings.
phrase_10: The path was written long before you were born.
